title: Rally Race Pro 3.0 Car Racing
description: Experience intense rally racing action in this realistic car driving simulator. Race across rugged hill roads, sharp turns, and challenging terrains while mastering drifting, braking, and precision driving. Tune your suspension, improve lap times, and climb the leaderboard in immersive offline rally races. Enjoy dynamic weather, realistic physics, detailed cars, and exciting driving challenges designed for fans of rally racing and car simulation games.

title: Number Merge Master
description: Begin a fast-thinking number showdown in Number Merge Master! One wrong step could cost you health, but a smart merge can keep you in the game and push your score even higher. Perfect for fans of puzzle-style gameplay who love quick decision-making and endless replay value.

title: FlapThe Bird
description: Get ready for a fun and addictive bird adventure! Control a flying bird in this exciting 2D game and help it survive as long as possible. Tap the screen to make the bird fly upward and avoid dangerous hurdles coming from the front. Be careful &mdash; if the bird touches the ground or hits obstacles, you will lose a life. You have 3 lives to keep the journey going. Test your reflexes, improve your timing, and see how far you can fly while dodging every challenge in your path!
instructions: Tap the screen to make the bird fly up Avoid hurdles and obstacles Do not touch the ground You have 3 lives to survive Fly as far as possible to get a high score

title: No Stress Game Challenges
description: When you need relaxation, diversion or just a moment of distraction enjoy this collection of toys: hear the sound of a bamboo chime, play with wooden boxes, swipe gently your finger in the water, tap buttons, draw with chalks and so on! Are you waiting for something and you need a diversion? Open Antistress app and start playing with a Newtons cradle! Are you furious with someone? Have some relaxation with the never-old fifteen game! Do you need distraction from study? Open Antistress app and choose one among dozens of toys to play!

title: Anime Idol Academy
description: Anime Idol Academy is a cute anime dress-up game where you help a rising idol student become a superstar! Choose beautiful hairstyles, stylish outfits, shoes, accessories, and idol items to match each stage theme. Complete fashion challenges, take photos of your idol, and unlock new looks as you progress through the academy. From training room practice to glamorous concert stages, create the perfect kawaii idol style and shine like a true anime star! How to play ? Click on play Then choose Level1 then click on NextButton on top right.

title: League of Football
description: Play League of Football, a fast-paced 2D soccer game! Pick your team, master fireball shots and teleport tricks, and battle through Quick Match, Tournament and 2-player modes. Score goals, win the championship and become a football legend. Easy to learn, hard to master &mdash; perfect for quick matches or full tournaments.

title: Stickboy Defender
description: Stickboy Defender is an action merge-and-shoot game. Recruit stickman units, drag them to the wall and merge identical units to create stronger fighters. Survive waves of enemies, upgrade your damage, income and prices, spin the lucky wheel for bonuses and collect offline earnings. Buy new troops in the shop, activate boosts like the delivery drone, auto-merge and coin multipliers, and clear every wave to claim victory.
instructions: Tap and drag units to the wall to place them Drag identical units onto each other to merge them into a stronger unit Tap buttons to upgrade damage income and prices and to buy new troops

title: Jelly Match Game
description: Dive into a colorful and fun puzzle adventure with Jelly Match! Match delicious jellies, solve exciting challenges, and enjoy a sweet journey full of surprises. Test your brain as you connect matching jellies and clear levels with smart moves and quick thinking.

title: Mech Core: Survivor
description: Mech-Core: Survivor is an intense, fast-paced top-down roguelite survival game. Take control of a heavily armored Mech and fight against endless waves of relentless alien swarms in a dark metallic arena. Collect Nanites from defeated enemies to level up and unlock devastating weapon upgrades like Rapid Lasers, Homing Missiles, and EMP Shockwaves. Combine different abilities to create the ultimate build. Can you survive the invasion and defeat the swarm bosses? Features: Fast-paced top-down shooter combat. Unique level-up system with stacking upgrades. Multiple enemy types and challenging boss fights.
instructions: W A S D or Arrow Keys to move your Mech Use the Mouse to aim Left Click to shoot Auto-fire is enabled by default

title: RebelRun
description: Free All your comrades from the Matrix. Run, jump, crouch, collect coins, unlock characters, and survive as long as possible in this fast-paced endless runner adventure! Dash through an ever-changing world filled with obstacles, enemies, power-ups, and rewards. Test your reflexes as you perform double jumps, dodge hazards, stomp over drones, and collect valuable coins and SuperCoins to unlock new characters. Every run presents a new challenge with procedurally generated environments, making each attempt unique. Use powerful boosts like Coin Magnets, Double Coins, and Protective Shields to push your high score further than ever before.
instructions: Fast tap on screen to jump click again to do a double jump - Spacebar in keyboard Hold screen to stay crouched - CTRL in keyboard

title: Epicrolla
description: Epicrolla is a one-tap isometric roller. Your ball climbs a diamond grid hopping corner to corner &mdash; every tap flips its heading left or right, and it bounces off the edges. Survive the gaps, lava, boxes and spinning portals long enough to hit each stages tile goal. Snatch item boxes for Invincibility, Coin Magnet, Slow-Mo, Dodge and Push power-ups, bank coins, and spend them on permanent upgrades, ball skins and a repeatable Second Chance. Easy to pick up, hard to master.
instructions: Mouse click Space or tap to play
